tasks.description: Initialize Mastra service in the monorepo with pnpm create mastra, restructure for monorepo layout.
steps: Run `pnpm create mastra@latest` in a temp directory to scaffold, then move relevant files into `mastra/` in the monorepo root
Ensure `mastra/package.json` has correct dependencies: `@mastra/core`, `@mastra/drizzle`, `drizzle-orm`, `drizzle-kit`, `pg`
Add `mastra/tsconfig.json` extending the project conventions
Add `mastra/.env.example` with `DATABASE_URL=postgresql://...` and `OPENAI_API_KEY`
Verify `pnpm install` works from the monorepo root
tasks.verify: cd mastra && pnpm install && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20

tasks.description: Create Drizzle schema for agents table with core fields and AgentSource enum.
steps: Create `mastra/src/db/schema.ts` with a `agents` table using Drizzle's `pgTable`
Add `agent_source` pgEnum with values: 'mastra', 'livekit', 'external'

Core columns: `id` (uuid pk), `name` (varchar 100, not null), `description` (text), `instructions` (text, not null), `category` (varchar 50), `tags` (jsonb, default []), `color` (varchar 7), `icon` (varchar 50), `source` (agent_source enum, default 'mastra'), `llm_model` (varchar), `is_online` (boolean, default true), `created_at` (timestamp, default now), `updated_at` (timestamp, default now)
Create `mastra/src/db/index.ts` — Drizzle client init with `DATABASE_URL`
Create `mastra/drizzle.config.ts` for migrations
Generate initial migration with `pnpm drizzle-kit generate`

tasks.description: Create agent CRUD service and REST routes in the Mastra service.
steps: Create `mastra/src/agents/agent-crud.ts` — functions: `listAgents(params?)`, `getAgent(id)`, `createAgent(data)`, `updateAgent(id, data)`, `deleteAgent(id)`
Use Drizzle queries against the agents table
Support filtering by `category` and `search` (ILIKE on name/description)
Create `mastra/src/routes/agents.ts` — Express/Hono routes: GET /api/agents, GET /api/agents/:id, POST /api/agents, PUT /api/agents/:id, DELETE /api/agents/:id
Wire routes into the Mastra server entry point

tasks.description: Register Mastra Agent runtime instances and add a streaming endpoint.
steps: Create `mastra/src/agents/runtime.ts` — function to instantiate Mastra `Agent` from a DB record (name, instructions, model → Agent class)
Register a default agent in the Mastra instance
Add POST /api/agents/:id/stream endpoint — loads agent config from DB, creates Mastra Agent instance, calls `agent.stream()`, returns SSE/streaming response
Handle streaming format compatible with Vercel AI SDK (text stream)
Wire into the Mastra server

tasks.description: Add agents module to NestJS backend that proxies CRUD and streaming to the Mastra service.
steps: Create `backend/src/agents/agents.module.ts`
Create `backend/src/agents/agents.service.ts` — HttpService calls to Mastra service at `MASTRA_URL` (default http://localhost:4111)
Create `backend/src/agents/agents.controller.ts` — REST endpoints: GET /agents, GET /agents/:id, POST /agents, PUT /agents/:id, DELETE /agents/:id, POST /agents/:id/stream (passthrough)
Create DTOs with validation: `create-agent.dto.ts` (name required, instructions required, source enum), `update-agent.dto.ts`
Import `AgentsModule` + `HttpModule` in `app.module.ts`
Add `MASTRA_URL` to `backend/.env.example`

tasks.description: Replace mock API client with real backend calls for agent CRUD.
steps: Rewrite `ui-web/src/lib/api.ts` — remove all MOCK_AGENTS, replace with real fetch calls to backend `/agents` endpoints
Keep same method signatures: `listAgents`, `getAgent`, `getAgentName`
Add `createAgent(data)`, `updateAgent(id, data)`, `deleteAgent(id)` methods
Update `Agent` interface in `types.ts`: remove voice fields, add `source` field with AgentSource type
Ensure error handling matches existing patterns

tasks.description: Add Create/Edit Agent dialog to the Agents page.
steps: Create `ui-web/src/components/agents/agent-form-dialog.tsx` — modal form for creating/editing agents

Fields: name, description, instructions (textarea), category (select from AGENT_CATEGORIES), color (preset color picker from AGENT_CARD_COLORS), icon, source (select: mastra/livekit/external), LLM model
Reuse existing shadcn Dialog, Input, Select, Textarea components
Wire 'Create Agent' button on agents page to open the dialog
On submit: call `api.createAgent()` or `api.updateAgent()`, refresh the agent list
Add edit button to `AgentCard` that opens the dialog in edit mode

tasks.description: Add delete agent functionality with confirmation.
steps: Add delete button to agent detail page (`ui-web/src/app/agents/[id]/page.tsx`)
Show confirmation dialog before deleting
Call `api.deleteAgent(id)`, redirect to agents list on success
Optionally add delete to the agent card dropdown menu

tasks.description: Create AgentPicker component (modeled after voice project) and wire into arena setup Step 1.
steps: Create `ui-web/src/components/arena/agent-picker.tsx` — based on voice project's AgentPicker
Fetch agents from `api.listAgents()` on mount
Toggle-select UI: checkbox + agent info (name, color, description, category), max 4 agents
Show selected count indicator
In `ui-web/src/app/arena/page.tsx` Step 1: replace empty placeholder with AgentPicker for 'agents' config mode
For 'manual' config mode: add simple inline form for name + instructions (no voice for now)
Track selection in state as `selectedAgents: Agent[]`
In `handleStartConversation`: pass selected agents as `nativeAgents` array with `name` and `instructions` to `createSession()`
Require at least 2 agents selected to proceed

tasks.description: Create seed script with default test agents.
steps: Create `mastra/src/scripts/seed.ts`
Insert 4 agents: Atlas (technical, source:mastra), Nova (creative, source:mastra), Sage (conversational, source:mastra), Debate Bot (debate, source:mastra)
Each agent has meaningful instructions, category, color, icon, llm_model
Add `seed` script to `mastra/package.json`: `tsx src/scripts/seed.ts`
Ensure idempotent — skip if agents with same names exist

tasks.description: Add PostgreSQL and Mastra service to docker-compose for dev and staging.
steps: Create `docker-compose.dev.yml` — postgres service only (for local dev): image postgres:16-alpine, port 5432, volume, env vars
Add `postgres` service to `docker-compose.staging.yml`: image postgres:16-alpine, volume, POSTGRES_DB/USER/PASSWORD
Create `mastra/Dockerfile`
Add `mastra` service to `docker-compose.staging.yml`: build from `mastra/`, depends_on postgres, DATABASE_URL pointing to postgres service
Update `backend` service in staging compose: add `MASTRA_URL=http://mastra:4111`
Update `.env.staging.example` with DATABASE_URL and MASTRA_URL
